title: The relationship between business objectives and organisational structure
summary: 9609 A Level — aligning structure with strategy and objectives.

simpleExplanation.title: Form follows purpose
simpleExplanation.summary: Organisational structure should enable objectives — growth may need decentralisation; cost focus may need tighter control.

sections.content: **Objectives and structure** (7.1.1) opens **Topic 7**. Link **6.2 strategy** to **org design**.
